title: Underground Bunkers x SCP-049 Compat
description: Adds SCP-049 from SCP Overtime to Underground Bunkers, in special containment units.
body:
_This is part of a series of datapacks which expand or modify my structure mods (Underground Bunkers, Sky Villages, Aether Villages, When Dungeons Arise, etc.). Please keep in mind these datapacks are often exclusive to specific mod versions._

This datapack adds SCP-049 from SCP Overtime mod to Underground Bunkers' special containment units. Both mods should be present!

**Underground Bunkers version 1.0.5 or above is required.**

These datapacks can be added via 'Resource Packs' and made global through the use of Yung's Paxi or Openloader. If you want to keep them on the resourcepacks folder, use Global Packs.

![SCP-049 Containment](https://i.postimg.cc/hjnd7ryb/2024-09-15-15-28-58.png)
